description:
Hello my (non-existent) followers!!!

I've seen that my Abby bot made 7 chats... Which surprises me that.. I don't know how I'm getting seen...

Anyways, I've seen that there aren't lots of (or am I bind?) Dying Light bots, except some RPGs and other stuff..

And so I decided to make it easy for you guys... I'm saying "you guys" in the future.

Anyways, have fun, do whatcha want with it..

~ Your Dearest, Dumbest...

Edd.
